mapper.select:
select TFSPL.*,TFD.COMPANY_NAME,TFD.CUSTOMER_NAME,tfdi.invoice_amout from T_FD_SHARE_PLATFORM_LOG TFSPL left join T_FD_INVOICE TFD on TFSPL.INVOICE_ID = TFD.ID left join (select INVOICE_ID,sum(AMOUNT) invoice_amout from T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL group by INVOICE_ID) tfdi on tfdi.INVOICE_ID = TFD.ID where status = '20'
to_char(TFSPL.OPER_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd')>=to_char(#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM-dd')
and to_char(TFSPL.OPER_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd') <=to_char(#{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM-dd')
select * from T_FD_SHARE_PLATFORM_LOG where status = '20' and operId = #{operId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
